notes: Opening opportunity openings:plaintiff. Record inspected with get_case/list_evidence/stat/read. Visible evidence: market-page case packet ev_2c7c2c8a2d76_market-page (title, URL, family PRESMENTION/NEWMENTION, strike Ronaldo, challenged No/requested Yes) and presmention terms ev_a373371a8c9c_presmention-terms (general NEWMENTION rules). Terms support that word must be said by entity during time period; event-based time periods can include event/context; words count as standalone units; proper nouns count; homographs count; minor mispronunciations count if intent clear; technical details exclude behind-the-scenes/rehearsal/unofficial recordings unless officially broadcast/published as part of time period. Key gap: packet lacks transcript/video proving Trump said Ronaldo in qualifying remarks and lacks full specific market source-agency language beyond URL/title. Source map: decisive proof should be official transcript/video of Trump public remarks at JFK Center immediately before formal draw. Target found outside record: GovInfo DCPD-202501162, official Compilation of Presidential Documents, 'Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw', with metadata for Dec. 5, 2025, 11:13 a.m., JFK Center, and names including Cristiano Ronaldo; HTML transcript includes Ronaldo mentions. This cannot be cited as admitted proof in opening; plan to submit/capture in later evidence phase if allowed. Adverse theory: defense will argue 'during the FIFA World Cup Draw' means formal program only and pre-program reporter exchange is outside scope or behind-the-scenes/unofficial; GovInfo note that portions could not be verified due to incomplete audio may affect weight but not necessarily the transcribed Ronaldo passage. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Defendant opening notes. Record checked with wait_for_opportunity, get_case, list_evidence, stat_evidence, read_evidence_range. Visible evidence remains only two case-packet files; no submitted evidence. Market-page packet shows market URL/title, family PRESMENTION/NEWMENTION, strike Ronaldo, challenged resolution No, requested Yes. Terms packet shows NEWMENTION: underlying is words used by entity during time period; time period can be event/context; where time period refers to an event, Exchange may specify what is included; behind-the-scenes content, rehearsals, sound checks, and unofficial recordings are not included unless officially broadcast/published as part of the time period; text/captions/sign language/AI impersonation rules; source agency hierarchy if specified. Plaintiff opening claims public venue remarks immediately before formal program should count.

Native investigation before opening: searched web for Trump/Ronaldo/FIFA World Cup Draw transcript. Leads found: GovInfo DCPD-202501162 titled remarks in an exchange with reporters prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw, event date Dec. 5, 2025, at Kennedy Center, names include Ronaldo/Messi, note transcript corrected Jan. 2 2026 and portions could not be verified due to incomplete audio. Senate Democratic transcript for reporters notes Trump walked red carpet 18 minutes before event, press pool about three minutes, video/audio pieced from TV Azteca, Telemundo, SBT Media, El Destape; portions inaudible. Separate formal-program transcript from Senate/CQ Factbase opened lines shows Trump remarks during draw about Pele/ticket sales/USA ball, no obvious Ronaldo mention in the visible formal-program lines. These outside materials are unadmitted in opening and not used as record proof; they are source targets for later evidence phase.

Defense theory: plaintiff bears burden by preponderance to prove not only standalone utterance but that it occurred during the market time period and via acceptable source material. Current record proves title/strike/generic terms, not utterance, timing, included segment, source agency, or official-publication status. Best defense framing: market phrase 'during the FIFA World Cup Draw' naturally points to the formal draw/program, and generic terms do not automatically expand an event to pre-program red-carpet reporter exchanges. Strongest adverse source likely proves a prior-to-event exchange naming Ronaldo; defense should distinguish prior from during and scrutinize incomplete audio/provenance/source agency. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Arguments:plaintiff work notes. Record refreshed with get_case/list_evidence/stat: no new evidence before plaintiff submissions beyond packet market-page and presmention terms. Defendant opening focuses on 'prior' not being 'during' and source/time-period connection. Submitted two source extracts. (1) GovInfo DCPD202501162 transcript extract accepted as ev_13b3de049039_submitted-evidence-01-plaintiff-13b3de049039, sha256 13b3de049039e1d1a422ff0747028df0388ff7443b4cf6e0e8b2f92a29baa000. It shows official title 'Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw,' President spoke at 11:13 a.m. at JFK Center, note says referred to Cristiano Ronaldo and Messi; transcript includes standalone Ronaldo utterances and later sequence 'we're a little late to get in there' / 'They wait.' Caveat: GovInfo note says portions could not be verified because audio incomplete; the relevant Ronaldo text is transcribed. (2) Kalshi public market-page rules extract accepted as ev_e99c8c3be4d0_submitted-evidence-02-plaintiff-e99c8c3be4d0, sha256 e99c8c3be4d0a81e844a6db2c29370ebdc52b77b9a638de43224d7c41d429cdc. It supplies source agencies, 'as part of FIFA World Cup Draw,' video primary/transcript fallback language; caveat page rendered Canada strike while packet identifies Ronaldo, so use only for market-family source/time language. Additional search: exact White House transcript searches did not find a White House remarks page; White House gallery found Nov. 18 Ronaldo meeting, not material. Analysis: word proof is strong; timing is contested; plaintiff argument should concede 'prior' title but stress event/context wording, public press opening, venue, live event waiting for them, no clear formal-stage cutoff, and preponderance.

Defendant merits notes. Opportunity arguments:defendant. Record scanned with get_case/list_evidence/stat/read. New plaintiff evidence: ev_13b3de049039 GovInfo DCPD202501162 extract, exact read confirms source title 'Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw', opening note joined in progress, Ronaldo passages attributed to Trump, timing/location note 11:13 a.m. at Kennedy Center, transcript released Dec. 8 2025 with corrected Jan. 2 2026 version, portions could not be verified because audio incomplete. Plaintiff ev_e99c8c3be4d0 Kalshi extract exact read confirms page rendered related strike Canada, not Ronaldo; says resolves yes if Trump says Canada 'as part of FIFA World Cup Draw'; video of FIFA World Cup Draw primarily used; if no video consensus, transcripts of FIFA World Cup Draw used; source list includes major media and White House; event closes by Dec. 5 2025 at 3:26pm EST.

Native investigation: opened Roll Call Factba.se formal transcript at https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/transcript/donald-trump-remarks-fifa-world-cup-drawing-december-5-2025. Page title observed 'Remarks: Donald Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing in Washington - December 5, 2025'; formal-program speaker stats show Trump 25 sentences, 274 words, 92 seconds. Browser/page find for exact 'Ronaldo' returned no matching text. Find for 'Pele' found Trump's formal-program remarks at 00:03:14. Submitted defense evidence ev_62032bb71fb1 with concise extraction and provenance.

Theory: concede GovInfo proves Ronaldo utterance in prior reporter exchange, but argue plaintiff fails operative timing/source rule. Plaintiff's own source is prior-to-draw and categorized as exchange with reporters; GovInfo official but corrected and incomplete audio affects weight. Kalshi extract helps defense because primary source is video of FIFA World Cup Draw and fallback transcripts of FIFA World Cup Draw, not all venue-adjacent pre-program press. Related-strike caveat weakens use of Kalshi page to expand Ronaldo contract. Formal-program transcript is better match for market title and contains no Ronaldo. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Rebuttal:plaintiff. Refreshed record/list evidence and read defendant's new evidence. New defense evidence ev_62032bb71fb1_submitted-evidence-03-defendant-62032bb71fb1 is a Roll Call/Factba.se formal-program transcript extract, not full video. It says source title/header is 'Remarks: Donald Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing in Washington'; speakers/stats; page text search for 'Ronaldo' returned no match; Pele excerpt found; full transcript begins with Mark Carney then Infantino/formal speakers. Defense uses it to claim formal draw has no Ronaldo and to distinguish GovInfo prior reporter exchange. Rebuttal theory: concede it is negative evidence for one formal transcript, but it does not define market boundary; it is not one of Kalshi's listed source agencies in our extract; the actual market wording is 'as part of FIFA World Cup Draw' and packet title is 'during the FIFA World Cup Draw,' with NEWMENTION event/context rules and no clear exclusion for public venue press availability. GovInfo extract remains official, venue/timing/source proof with Infantino present and event waiting; 'prior' label is not dispositive under an event-context market. No additional evidence needed; use existing offered evidence and answer defendant's strongest point.

Defendant surrebuttal notes. Opportunity surrebuttals:defendant. Checked get_case/list_evidence/stat. No new plaintiff evidence after arguments; plaintiff rebuttal relies on same GovInfo prior-to-draw extract and Kalshi market-family extract. Rebuttal's strongest point: defense formal transcript only proves no Ronaldo in one formal stage segment and market did not clearly exclude public event-site remarks immediately before entry. Planned response: focus on burden and source wording. Plaintiff must prove inclusion, not just absence of an express exclusion. 'As part of FIFA World Cup Draw' must be read with the same Kalshi source sentence saying video of the FIFA World Cup Draw and transcripts of the FIFA World Cup Draw resolve the market; that points to the event artifact, not all adjacent interactions. Plaintiff's facts prove prior/about/at venue, not during/as part of the draw. Terms' express exclusions do not imply every official public non-rehearsal remark counts. No new evidence needed. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.

Closing:plaintiff. Final record scan completed with get_case/list_evidence/stat on key GovInfo and Roll Call/Factba.se evidence. No new evidence allowed. Record evidence: packet market page identifies disputed strike Ronaldo; packet NEWMENTION terms; plaintiff GovInfo extract proving Trump said Ronaldo in public reporter exchange at JFK Center at 11:13 before World Cup Draw; plaintiff Kalshi extract with 'as part of FIFA World Cup Draw' and video/transcript source language; defendant Roll Call/Factba.se formal-program extract with no Ronaldo match. Defendant surrebuttal strongest point: plaintiff bears burden and source title 'prior to' plus formal transcript absence means No. Closing approach: concede formal transcript evidence helps defense if market limited to formal stage, but argue market did not say that; event/context terms and 'as part of' language favor inclusion of public event-site press remarks immediately before formal program, with Infantino present and event waiting. GovInfo provenance caveat acknowledged but relevant Ronaldo passages transcribed; Roll Call extract is negative evidence from narrower transcript, not boundary-setting contract language.

Defendant closing notes. Opportunity closings:defendant. Final scan completed with get_case/list_evidence/stat_evidence for the three submitted evidence items. No new evidence after surrebuttal; plaintiff closing adds no source material. Existing material evidence: market-page packet, NEWMENTION terms packet, plaintiff GovInfo prior-to-draw reporter exchange, plaintiff Kalshi related-strike/source extract, defense Roll Call formal draw transcript extract. Closing theory: concede word element because GovInfo proves Trump said Ronaldo in a public reporter exchange; decisive failure is temporal/source scope. GovInfo proves prior-to-draw exchange, not during draw. Kalshi extract's resolver language points to video/transcripts of the FIFA World Cup Draw and rendered a different strike (Canada). Defense formal transcript is best admitted proxy for formal draw and has no Ronaldo match. Plaintiff's 'not clearly excluded' framing flips burden: preponderance requires proving qualifying event period, not merely related official remark plus lack of explicit exclusion. Ask council to uphold No. Journal updated at /aar-codex/aar-work-notes.md.
